---
title: "Cleaning 1"
author: "Raja Chinnakotla"
date: "2/28/26"
output: html_document
---
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(tidyr)
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
```

>> Cleaning the data for languages

```{r}
language <- read_excel("language_mother_tounge_city.xls")
language<- language %>% select(-...9, -...10, -...12, -...13, -...15, -...16)
language <- language[-1, ]
colnames(language) <- language[1, ]
language <- language[-1, ]
language <- language %>% drop_na() %>%
  filter(grepl("000$", MOTHER)) %>%
  group_by(TOWN) %>%
  mutate(TOTAL = as.numeric(TOTAL),
    PERCENT = round(TOTAL/sum(TOTAL) * 100, 5))
View(language)

lang_dist <- unique(language$`AREA NAME`)
```

```{r}
towns <- read_excel("town_directory.xls")
towns <- towns %>% select(DIST_CODE, THSIL_CODE, TOWN_CODE, TOWN_NAME, CLASS, C_STATUS, AREA, POP_2001, DENSITY) %>% rename(TOWN = TOWN_CODE) %>%
  drop_na() %>%
  mutate(AREA = as.numeric(AREA),
         POP_2001 = as.numeric(POP_2001),
         DENSITY = as.numeric(DENSITY))
View(towns)

```
